Z[c[j]]=(485565+-485564)+Z[c[j]]end if n then local S=n(true)local h=x(S)h[j(721063+-752708)],h[j(-1006443-(-974737))],h[j(35110-66897)]=c,l,function()return-1623082-847135 end return S else return g({},{[j(530714+-562420)]=l,[j(-585252-(-553607))]=c,[j(-971561-(-939774))]=function()return-2553597-(-83380)end})end end,function(c,j)local h=w(j)local n=function(n)return S(c,{n},j,h)end return n end,function(c,j)local h=w(j)local n=function(n,g,x,R)return S(c,{n,g,x;R},j,h)end return n end return(z(8575944-(-362423),{}))(h(U))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[j(-507297-(-475377))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
